channel.title: UrbanTimes
channel.description: Enterprise-Grade Tech & AI Automation for Small Business

item.title: Enterprise-Grade Tech for Small Businesses
item.description: Discover how UrbanTimes empowers small businesses with custom web development and smart AI automation. Bridging the gap between enterprise capabilities and small business realities.

item.title: The Founder's Journey
item.description: After 20 years in Banking and Airlines, we are bringing enterprise-grade technology to small businesses.
